intent: Open a public Greenhouse-hosted careers page.
Wait for the listings to render.
Walk the first 5 job listings and extract role / team / location.

steps.intent: Click into the next unvisited job listing.
steps.hint: Click the next job title link in the listings table that we have not yet visited.

steps.intent: Extract the role title, team / department, and location.

steps.hint: Press Alt+Left to navigate back to the listings page.
